summary: A clip of a formal state-dinner-style event showing four people in formal evening attire posed at the foot of a grand staircase: a woman in a magenta gown, a man in formal dress with a sash and medals, a man in white-tie evening dress, and a woman in a pale gown with long gloves. The framing holds on the group.

script.scene: Four people in formal evening attire stand posed at the foot of a grand staircase.
The same posed group continues, with slight movement.
